summary: An assembly test failed FileCheck verification: the CHECK patterns in tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs were not found in the generated assembly file, causing the test suite to fail.
root_cause: /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs failed FileCheck verification because expected CHECK strings were not found in /checkout/obj/build/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/test/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions/wasm_exceptions.s.

evidence.reason: Shows the specific assembly test that failed.

evidence.quote: /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs:38:12: error: CHECK: expected string not found in input
evidence.reason: FileCheck reported that an expected CHECK pattern from the test file was not found in the assembly input.
Indicates where FileCheck began scanning the generated assembly file, tying the test to this specific output file.
This actual assembly text appears in the generated file near the scanning position; the test's expected string(s) around this call were not matched.
Confirms that FileCheck verification of the assembly against the CHECK patterns failed.
Shows the exact FileCheck invocation used to compare the generated assembly to the test's CHECK file.

evidence.quote: test result: FAILED. 550 passed; 1 failed; 103 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 15.38s
evidence.reason: Shows overall test run result and that this single failure caused the suite to report failure.

evidence.quote: Some tests failed in compiletest suite=assembly-llvm mode=assembly host=x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu target=wasm32-wasip1
evidence.reason: Places the failure in the assembly-llvm compiletest suite and indicates the host/target context.

suggested_fix: Compare the CHECK patterns in /checkout/tests/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions.rs with the actual assembly in /checkout/obj/build/x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/test/assembly-llvm/wasm_exceptions/wasm_exceptions.s. Either update the test's CHECK lines to match the current emitted assembly, or adjust the codegen so the expected patterns appear. Then re-run the FileCheck-based assembly test.
